'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 57''', also styled as '''''Star Wars'' Magazine 57''',  was the 57th issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]''. While labeled as an issue of the magazine, it is actually a reprint of the ''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: Official Episode III Souvenir Movie Guide]]'' that was published in [[April]] [[2005]].
